# Rustic array min/max helper showcase fixtures
let xs = []; let i = 0; while i < 5 { xs = push(xs, 10 - i * 2); i = i + 1; }; min(xs) * 10 + max(xs) => 30
let xs = [3, 1, 4]; let ys = set(xs, 1, 6); min(xs) * 10 + max(ys) => 16
fn build(n) { let xs = []; let i = 1; while i <= n { xs = push(xs, i * i); i = i + 1; }; xs }; max(build(4)) - min(build(4)) => 15
